feed.title: SAP Community - SAP S/4HANA Public Cloud
feed.subtitle: SAP S/4HANA Public Cloud Q&A in SAP Community

entry.title: Tax statement item missing for tax code
entry.content:
When posting a Billing Document receiving an error message "Document 90000xxx: Tax statement item missing for tax code O0".

What steps need to be taken to for resolution.

Thanks in advance.

Chempian Pontie

entry.title: SAP Public Cloud: Stock Transfer Order (STO)
entry.content:
Hi,

My colleague has a question: why does Stock Transfer Order (STO) in public cloud before approval show as demand in Stock/Requirements list of the supplying plant? Thank you.

Regards,

Juan

entry.title: Destinaiton storage BIN for outbound delivery
entry.content:
HI Expert,

we have an requirement that while posting outbound delivery we need to pick item from specific BIN (Source BIN) and directly post goods issue, we dont want to move this into destination BIN. in system every outbound while creating picking warehosue task i have to define staging Bay which i want to ignore. i want to deliver the goods from direct BIN. 

here its trying to move source to destination BIN then post goods issue, here how i can maintian source BIN manually and destination will be like delivery id or can we mainatin one default Staging Bay for all delivery automatically.

entry.title: Intelligent product proposal Functionality - Adjustment
entry.content:
Dear Team,

I would like to understand is there any way we can set the parameter in the Intelligent product proposal Functionality in S/4 Hana public cloud. It proposes the products based on the History, Listed Materials, CMIR etc. but does it possible to set a range on picking the products based on History of sales data (Ex-Last 6 months order history)? Can we control something similar in public cloud?

Regards,

Rajeev

entry.title: Migration of transactional data for fixed assets
entry.content:
Dear experts,

During the migration of fixed assets transactional data, we obtain the following results in the simulation:

Asset 000082000001 0000 not in company code 3910

This message is shown for both depreciation areas /ledger!

Please note the attached information!

Do you have any idea?

Thanks for you support!

BR Jan

entry.title: Is it possible to modify the data of recurring supplier invoices to be posted?
entry.content:
Hi All,

I am using the app F4312 recurring supplier invoice, to register the utility invoices that arrive every month, but it is necessary to change some data before the invoice is posted, for example the supplier invoice number (Reference), the value, among others.

When executing, the system creates the supplier invoice and immediately posts it, but it does not allow me to visualize the invoice before it is posted in order to change the data. I am trying to do is that only the invoice of the month is created, but it is not posted.

Is this what I am trying to do possible, or am I going about the process incorrectly?

Thanks in advanc

entry.title: Reprint Sales Contract with updated data
entry.content: Can we re print sales contract output with the updated sales contract data? If there is a miss typed quantity in sales contract and the sales contract already saved, then I want to change the quantity and re print it.

entry.title: s/4hana public cloud work center hierarchy
entry.content:
Hi, Folks , 

do you know how to create work center hierarchy in s4hpc?

 

thanks

entry.title: Add field in purchase order email notification
entry.content: # 0062597539 We use the function that email notification in purchase order flexiable workflow , details are as follows Email template: MMPUR_PO_WFL_DEADLINE_EMAIL Language: Chinese So, we have a business requirement is to add these filed in body HTML, but it can't add these following fields we want in standard template Item Product;Item Product describtion; Item quantity; Item unit ; Item net price ;Item delivery date ;payment term Is there any enhancement or configuration to add these fields?

entry.title: SQVI in S/4 Public edition
entry.content:
Hello seniors!

How can I find the s/4 pce version of sqvi?

Thanks in advance

huny

entry.title: Scope items 1J2 vs 5XU difference
entry.content:
Hello, I'm trying to search for an accurate description of functionalities for scope items 1J2 and 5XU but apart from the basic business benefits I don't really see the list of functionalities anywhere. Maybe someone will know:

What functionalities can I use when 1J2 is activated?

And what can I do when 5XU is activated (but could not do with just 1J2)?

Thanks!

entry.title: Error in creating BP Customer via API
entry.content:
Dear Experts,

we are trying to create a new customer throught API:

PATCH https://xx-api.s4hana.cloud.sap/sap/opu/odata/sap/API_BUSINESS_PARTNER/A_Customer(Customer='CC0010') 

We have already created the BP general's data (Business Partner(Gen.) 000000) with the API:

POST https://xxx-api.s4hana.cloud.sap/sap/opu/odata/sap/API_BUSINESS_PARTNER/A_BusinessPartner 

but we get the following error:

<?xml version="1.0" encoding="utf-8"?>
<error xmlns="http://schemas.microsoft.com/ado/2007/08/dataservices/metadata">
    <code>/IWBEP/CM_MGW_RT/020</code>
    <message xml:lang="en">Resource not found for segment 'A_CustomerType'</message>
    <innererror>
        <application>
            <component_id>LO-MD-BP</component_id>
            <service_namespace>/SAP/</service_namespace>
            <service_id>API_BUSINESS_PARTNER</service_id>
            <service_version>0001</service_version>
        </application>
        <transactionid>63B568C79CA901E0E0065D41A20679BB</transactionid>
        <timestamp>20240220092427.0382470</timestamp>
        <Error_Resolution>
            <SAP_Transaction>For backend administrators: use ADT feed reader "SAP Gateway Error Log" or run transaction /IWFND/ERROR_LOG on SAP Gateway hub system and search for entries with the timestamp above for more details</SAP_Transaction>
            <SAP_Note>See SAP Note 1797736 for error analysis (https://service.sap.com/sap/support/notes/1797736)</SAP_Note>
        </Error_Resolution>
        <longtext_url>/sap/opu/odata/iwbep/message_text;o=LOCAL/T100_longtexts(MSGID='%2FIWBEP%2FCM_MGW_RT',MSGNO='020',MESSAGE_V1='A_CustomerType',MESSAGE_V2='',MESSAGE_V3='',MESSAGE_V4='')/$value</longtext_url>
        <errordetails>
            <errordetail>
                <ContentID/>
                <code>/IWBEP/CX_MGW_BUSI_EXCEPTION</code>
                <message>Resource not found for segment 'A_CustomerType'</message>
                <longtext_url>/sap/opu/odata/iwbep/message_text;o=LOCAL/T100_longtexts(MSGID='%2FIWBEP%2FCM_MGW_RT',MSGNO='020',MESSAGE_V1='A_CustomerType',MESSAGE_V2='',MESSAGE_V3='',MESSAGE_V4='')/$value</longtext_url>
                <propertyref/>
                <severity>error</severity>
                <target/>
                <transition>false</transition>
            </errordetail>
        </errordetails>
    </innererror>
</error>

Could you kindly tell me how to solve the problem?

Is there a log on S4 Public where I can go to see these errors?

thanks in advance

Giuseppe

entry.title: MRP Planned order generation for materials procured externally (Procurement type X)
entry.content:
Dear Experts,

We are in the process of migrating from SAP R/3 to SAP S/4HANA Cloud Publid Edition.

Our customer in SAP R/3 manages his MRP by generating planned orders for externally procured materials.

As the note 2490226 says, this is no longer possible in SAP S/4HANA and MRP Live.

However, we are considering, for these externally procured type materials to indicate the Procurement Type "X - Both Procurement Types".
With this option enabled, we can generate planned orders via MRP and subsequently convert these planned orders to purchase requisitions.

This scenario has been tested and works correctly.

Based on this information, we are concern that SAP in the medium/long term will remove this functionality and we will have to re-engineer MRP processes.
Therefore, is the scenario that we have proposed a good practice contemplated by SAP or should we propose the scenario with a Procurement Type "F - External Procurement" and generate purchase requisitions through the MRP?

Thank you very much in advance.

Best regards

entry.title: GRDC-Create forms for multiple consolidation units
entry.content:
Hello SAP Community,Calling for GRDC Experts.
I know that within the Application Manage Packages for the GRDC Forms we have the filter Consolidation Unit where we can input several Consolidation Unit.
Having several Conso Unit in my package will generate several line in my application Enter Package Data and thus this will imply for every Period + Conso Unit I have 1 line of forms that I can enter data forMy question is the following:
Is there a way to include several Consolidation Units within 1 form in GRDC ?

Thank you

entry.title: How to Download XML Data File of Goods Receipt in S/4 Public Cloud
entry.content:
Hello SAP Experts,

How can i download XML Data file for  Goods Receipt Form - Purchase Order in SAP S/4 Public Cloud?

Thanks,

Sai Bhargav

entry.title: How to Download XML Data File for Inspection Report in S/4 Public Cloud?
entry.content:
Hello SAP Experts,

How can I XML Data File for QM_INSPECTION_REPORT_FORM_E, I tried with Manage Inspection lot but i was unable to get the XML file?

Thanks,

Sai Bhargav

entry.title: change log in Manage Purchase Contracts
entry.content:
Hello,

Using app "Manage Purchase Contracts", how to view the change log for header and items.

Best Regards

Sridhar

entry.title: Automatic Create PO From Goods Receipt
entry.content: Can we create automatic PO when create goods receipt in SAP S4HANA Public Cloud?

entry.title: Adding custom dropdown fields to Standard FIORI "Manage Customer Master Data" Application
entry.content:
We have a requirement to add custom drop-down fields in Standard FIORI Application "Manage Customer Master Data".

Please provide some guidance on how to achieve this.

Thanks,

Brinda S

entry.title: How to run MR22(Debit/Credit Material) Mass upload in S/4 HANA Cloud Public
entry.content:
Hello seniors!

 

Material valuation app of S/4 HANA CLOUD Pubilc edition. I understand the Excel bulk change function, which is the same function as MR21 (Change Inventory Price) in the Private Edition.

However, I did not find the Debit/Credit Material Excel bulk change function, which is the same function as MR22 in the Private Edition.

Can you tell me how to run MR22 Debit/Credit Material in Excel mass change in the Manage Valuation App?

Thanks in advance
huny
